seo.title: Receipt Scanner App — Scan, Track & Export Receipts | Invoicemonk
seo.description: The Invoicemonk receipt scanner app captures every receipt in seconds. AI-powered OCR, auto-categorised expenses, tax-ready exports, cloud sync. Free on Google Play.
seo.serviceDescription: Free Android receipt scanner app with AI-powered OCR, automatic expense categorisation, and cloud sync to your Invoicemonk account for invoicing and tax-ready exports.

seoFaqs.question: What is the best receipt scanner app for small business?
seoFaqs.answer: The best receipt scanner app is one that captures the receipt accurately, categorises the expense automatically, and links the record to your invoicing and tax reporting. Invoicemonk's Android app does all three: AI-powered OCR extracts vendor, date, tax, and total in seconds; expenses are auto-tagged for IRS, HMRC, CRA, ATO, and other jurisdictions; and every scan syncs to your Invoicemonk web account so receipts sit next to the invoices they relate to.

seoFaqs.question: Is Invoicemonk's receipt scanner app free?
seoFaqs.answer: Yes. The Invoicemonk Android app is free to download and use for receipt scanning and expense tracking. A paid Invoicemonk subscription (Pro from $15/month) unlocks invoicing, client management, multi-currency, and compliance features on the web app.

seoFaqs.question: Does the receipt scanner work offline?
seoFaqs.answer: Yes. Scan receipts anywhere — the app queues them locally and syncs to your Invoicemonk account when you're back online. Great for travel days and client site visits.

seoFaqs.question: How accurate is the OCR?
seoFaqs.answer: Our OCR reads printed, thermal, and most handwritten receipts, and extracts vendor, date, subtotal, tax, total, and currency. You can review and correct any field in one tap before saving.

seoFaqs.question: Can I export receipts for my accountant?
seoFaqs.answer: Yes. Export receipts as PDF, CSV, or a zipped image bundle. Filter by date range, category, or client — perfect for tax season, expense reimbursements, or an audit.

seoFaqs.question: Is there an iPhone version?
seoFaqs.answer: Not yet — the iOS app is in development. Join the iOS waitlist to be notified when it launches, or use the Invoicemonk web app on your iPhone browser in the meantime.

faq.title: Receipt questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about digital receipt management.

items.question: How does receipt scanning work?
items.answer: Simply take a photo of your receipt with your phone or upload an image. Our AI-powered OCR extracts the vendor, date, amount, and category automatically. It works with printed and handwritten receipts.

items.question: How long are receipts stored?
items.answer: Receipts are stored securely for as long as you need them, meeting tax authority requirements in your region. You can also export or delete receipts at any time.

items.question: Can I search my old receipts?
items.answer: Yes! Our full-text search lets you find any receipt by vendor name, amount, date, or category. You'll never lose a receipt again.

items.question: How does this integrate with expenses?
items.answer: Receipts can be attached to expense entries automatically or manually. When you scan a receipt, we can create the expense entry for you.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. All receipts are encrypted both in transit and at rest. We use bank-level security to protect your data. You control who has access.

items.question: Can I export receipts for my accountant?
items.answer: Yes, you can export receipts individually or in bulk. Choose from PDF, CSV, or image formats. Perfect for tax time or audits.
